resources.string: Kay maximum-kama, ñawpaqpi qhipanaykipaq aswan pisi qullqiwan ranti yapasqaykita kikinmanta hatunyachisaqku.
Qan ranti rurasqaykita churanki ichaqa kunallan aswan hatun ranti yapasqa karqan. Hukpiq ranti yapaqqa aswan hatun maximum-yuq. Paypa ranti yapasqanqa kunan %1$s.
Pago checkout mana qallariyta atikunchu — vendiqqa pago churayta manaraq tukuchinmanchu
Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
Pakasqa qhatuq qhawapayasunkikama, utaq 14 p\'unchaw qhipaman.
Hamuq rantiqkunata yanapay — kay orden imayna pasasqanta willay.
Kayqa subscripcionniykita mana ruwanqachu. Kunan billing mit\'aykiq tukukunyninpi yaykuyniykita chinkanki.
Subscripcionkunaqa kutin kutin rantiykunan — rantikuqkuna killa wata chaninwan churanku.
Wakin ruwaykuna, musuq qatuykunata kamariy hinaspa kachaykunata tukuy, harkasqam kachkanku cuentaykiq kay kasqanmanta.
Kunan mañakuymanta aswan hatun chaninta qillqay
Pagu p\'anqa kichanapaq manam ima naveqadorpas kanchu
Kay qatuypi pagukunata chaskinapaq Stripe cuentata tinkichiy.
Plataforma pagu: %1$s%%. Procesador pagukunapaq Stripe panelniykita qaway.
Hunt\'a qullqi yupaykuna. Qatuq quri kikin qullqinpi suskuwan llamk\'an.
Kay vendiqqa hark\'asqam. Mosoq ordenkunaqa manam churaykunmanchu.
Kay vendiqqa sayachisqam. Mosoq ordenkunaqa sayachisqam kachkan cuentan kutichikunankama.
Rantiyqa wisq\'asqam vendiqpa cuentan hark\'asqa kachkaptin.
Mosoq qhatuyta llamiy ñawpaq imaykita kamariykunaykipaq.
Vendiqman willakuyta apachiqtiyki (utaq rantiq willakuyta apachimusunki) hilonchaqa kaypim rikhurinqa.
Bancoyki kay ordenpaq qullqi kutichiyta mañakurqan. Stripeqa vendiqwan churanakuyta apachichkan; rurasqa kaqtin kaypim rikhurinqa.
Rantiqkunapas vendiqkunapas tukusqa orden qhipata qhawarinakuyta atinkum.
Mayqin qhatuypipas marcador icononta llamiy qhipapaq waqaychanaykipaq.
Hamuq rantiykunapi kikinmanta hunt\'akunqa pago tinkichiy yapasqa kaptin.
Factura hinaspa impuesto hunt\'aypaq servin. Manam llapan runaman qhawana perfilniykipi rikhurinchu.
Stripe-ta tinkichiy imakunata qhatuyta qallarinaykipaq hinaspa qullqita chaskinaykipaq.
Huk qhatuq cuentata kamariy imakunata qhatuyta qallarinaykipaq hinaspa rantiqkunaman chayanaykipaq.
Kaypi astawan qhatuq cuenta akllaykuna rikhurinqa kaqlla kanqanku hina.
Stripe-ta tinkichiy imakunata qhatuyta manaraq qallarishaspa.
Qhatuq perfilniykita kamariy qullqi churanata manaraq tinkichishaspa.
Qhatuq churayniyki hunt\'asqaña. Kaypi Stripe-ta kamachiyta atinki utaq cuentaykip qhipa kawsayninta qhawayta.
Imaymanakunata churayta qallarinaykipaq qhatuq perfilniykita ruway
Rantiqkunamanta qullqi chaskinaykipaq Stripe cuentata watay
Stripeqa pagokuna chaskinapaq aswan willakuyta munan. Stripe Dashboardpi requisitokunata hunt\'achiy, hinaspa Estadota Qhaway nisqata ñit\'iy.
